page_metadata.biotools__summary: Identifies orthologs based on precomputed phylogenetic trees in the PhyloFacts resource. Users may target different taxonomic distances and precision levels by using tree-distance thresholds.
page_metadata.bioschemas__summary: Identifies orthologs based on precomputed phylogenetic trees in the PhyloFacts resource. Users may target different taxonomic distances and precision levels by using tree-distance thresholds.
